name: example-html-ppt-pitch-deck
title: Write a Demo Day Pitch like a Top Accelerator Partner

title_i18n.en: Write a Demo Day Pitch like a Top Accelerator Partner
title_i18n.zh-CN: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演
title_i18n.zh-TW: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演

description: Open Design's demo-day pitch: hook, traction, moat, and the raise — built to make a partner sit up by page three. Built as a decision-grade fundraising pitch deck for accelerator partners, angels.

description_i18n.en: Open Design's demo-day pitch: hook, traction, moat, and the raise — built to make a partner sit up by page three. Built as a decision-grade fundraising pitch deck for accelerator partners, angels.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演——一份可商业交付的融资路演 Deck，围绕真实主题、证据链与决策目标组织。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演——一份可商业交付的融资路演 Deck，围绕真实主题、证据链与决策目标组织。

query.en: Create "Write a Demo Day Pitch like a Top Accelerator Partner" as a decision-grade Fundraising pitch deck in this template's own visual system. Subject: Open Design's demo-day pitch: hook, traction, moat, and the raise — built to make a partner sit up by page three. Audience: accelerator partners, angels. First ask only for missing essentials: audience, decision target, source-of-truth materials, deadline, and must-keep numbers. Then produce the slide plan, written slides, visual direction, speaker-ready structure, and a critic pass against this rubric: would an investor know why this is venture-scale and urgent.
query.zh-CN: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演。像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演——一份可商业交付的融资路演 Deck，围绕真实主题、证据链与决策目标组织。 主题：Open Design's demo-day pitch: hook, traction, moat, and the raise — built to make a partner sit up by page three. 先确认受众、决策目标、素材来源、截止时间和必须保留的数据，再输出叙事主线、页面规划、逐页文案、视觉方向和按评审标准自检的版本。

exampleOutputs.title: Write a Demo Day Pitch like a Top Accelerator Partner

title_i18n.en: Write a Demo Day Pitch like a Top Accelerator Partner
title_i18n.zh-CN: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演
title_i18n.zh-TW: 像顶级加速器合伙人一样写 Demo Day 路演

inputs.name: one_line_pitch
inputs.label: Name + one-line pitch
inputs.placeholder: Company name and one sentence explaining what it does

inputs.name: key_traction_numbers
inputs.label: Key traction numbers
inputs.placeholder: Revenue, growth, users, pilots, retention, pipeline, or other investor proof

inputs.name: ask_and_use_of_funds
inputs.label: Ask + use of funds
inputs.placeholder: Round size and how the capital will be used
